texto: Friends and People are like clouds and trees that we see hustling past the window of a running train.Trees are like PEOPLE.. all running.. in the opposite direction
autor: Clouds are like our FRIENDS.. like family.. our near and dear ones..They remain with us
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Clouds are like our FRIENDS.. like family.. our near and dear ones..They remain with us: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Friends and People are like clouds and trees that we see hustling past the window of a running tr…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e dia-chuvoso.
